Class FileModel

java.lang.Object
java.io.File
cs520.model.FileModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<File>
public class FileModel extends File
Represents a FileModel for the MVC architecture pattern. NOTE) Conceptually applies the Decorator design pattern.
See Also:
